inner_selection.criterion: minimize mean across parent clusters of the within-parent mean absolute error averaged equally across R_8X6B, R_9E6Y and exact-min R_dual_min on combined inner OOF predictions

training_weights.rule: equal total weight per teacher source, equal weight per parent within source, equal weight per candidate within parent
training_weights.normalization: sum weights equals train candidate count

no_feature_baseline: For each outer fold, predict the globally weighted outer-train mean R8/R9 for every outer-score row; derive exact-min. Source or parent ID is not used at prediction time.

parent_macro: within-parent Spearman where n>=3 and nonconstant

unchanged_v2_4_promotion_gate.additional_source_gate: each source Rdual MAE lower than no-feature baseline
unchanged_v2_4_promotion_gate.additional_parent_gate: parent-macro Rdual MAE lower than no-feature baseline

claim_boundary: Open-development whole-parent OOF evaluation of a computational docking-geometry surrogate only; not binding, affinity, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, or submission truth.
